# SettleWire

> Prediction markets news, contextualized. We cluster coverage of each event
> from 90+ outlets, credit the first reporter, and add original analysis of
> why it matters for traders, operators, and regulation watchers. All article
> text is our own original writing; every story links to its primary source.

## Sections
- [Front page](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/index.html)
- [Story archive](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/all.html): every story, searchable
- [The Docket](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/events.html): upcoming court dates, earnings, deadlines
- [RSS feed](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/rss.xml)

## Latest stories
- [ChatGPT integrates Kalshi market data as live cited source](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/chatgpt-integrates-kalshi-market-data-as-live-cited-source.html): OpenAI's ChatGPT began citing Kalshi prediction-market data as a named source in responses, giving the platform direct visibility inside the world's most-used AI assistant.
- [Kalshi launches AI compute forward curves, targeting tech economy traders](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-launches-ai-compute-forward-curves-targeting-tech-economy-traders.html): Kalshi announced the launch of Compute Forward Curves on its exchange, creating the first regulated event-contract market tied to AI infrastructure pricing and future compute costs.
- [Kalshi develops event contracts tied to AI computing power markets](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-develops-event-contracts-tied-to-ai-computing-power-markets.html): Kalshi is expanding its prediction-market offerings to include contracts linked to AI computing power, ramping up efforts to build a new asset class around GPU and cloud capacity pricing.
- [House Agriculture Committee examines consumer protections in sports prediction markets](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/house-agriculture-committee-examines-consumer-protections-in-sports-prediction-m.html): The House Committee on Agriculture convened a formal hearing to scrutinize customer safeguards and market integrity standards specifically within sports event prediction markets, marking Congress's most direct legislative focus yet on the sector.
- [Polymarket $50 Invite-Code Promotions Target MLB All-Star, World Cup Markets](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-50-invite-code-promotions-target-mlb-all-star-world-cup-markets.html): Polymarket is offering $50 bonuses via invite codes including "CUSE" and "SBWIRE" to new users in New York, Pennsylvania, and Texas ahead of the MLB All-Star Game and World Cup Semifinal on July 14.
- [Malta Eyes Prediction Markets Regulatory Framework After Crypto Playbook](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/malta-eyes-prediction-markets-regulatory-framework-after-crypto-playbook.html): Malta is pursuing a formal regulatory framework for prediction markets, applying lessons from its earlier cryptocurrency licensing push to attract prediction-market operators to the jurisdiction.
- [Rothera picks Adaptive to build CFTC-regulated event contracts exchange](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/rothera-picks-adaptive-to-build-cftc-regulated-event-contracts-exchange.html): Rothera has selected Adaptive's Aeron Exchange Accelerator technology to construct a CFTC-regulated event contracts trading and clearing platform, adding a new entrant to the regulated prediction-market space.
- [Polymarket Embeds in Blockchain.com App, Reaching 43 Million Users](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-embeds-in-blockchain-com-app-reaching-43-million-users.html): Blockchain.com has partnered with Polymarket to integrate prediction-market event contracts directly into its brokerage app, giving Polymarket access to the platform's 43 million registered users.
- [Kalshi, Polymarket Top $50B in June as World Cup Drives Record Volume](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-polymarket-top-50b-in-june-as-world-cup-drives-record-volume.html): Kalshi, Polymarket, and Robinhood's Rothera joint venture collectively surpassed $50 billion in notional trading volume in June 2026, their biggest month ever, fueled by the 2026 FIFA World Cup.
- [Polymarket Signs Crypto Partnership Ahead of World Cup Semifinals](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-signs-crypto-partnership-ahead-of-world-cup-semifinals.html): Polymarket announced a partnership with an unnamed crypto firm timed to the FIFA World Cup semifinals, while simultaneously running a $50 promotional offer for new users via code "OREGON".
